baselines: BL2 Count-only SPRT with nominal assumptions
BL4 Fixed-threshold TS detector without minimax prior calibration
BL5 Rate-only CUSUM with FAR matching
acceptance_criteria: At matched FAR=1e-3, median delay <= single-prior baseline in >=70% of evaluated regimes.
CalibrationViolationRate <= 0.05 across prior families and seeds.
Leave-one-prior-out FAR inflation <= 1.25x relative to in-family calibration.

artifact_expectations.description: Calibration and FAR coverage by prior family
Scenario manifests and run-level summary outputs

uncertainty_method: Seeded bootstrap confidence intervals over delay and FAR metrics.
